name: Mushrooms with Tarragon
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
3. Add mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown, about 5-7 minutes.
4. Stir in tarragon, soy sauce, and salt. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the mushrooms are tender and all ingredients are well combined.
5. Serve hot.
